rag_rules: Repair validator diagnostics by fixing root unresolved references or removing invalid clauses instead of adding architecture
Use only visible AADL features or eq helpers declared in the same annex for named things
Align helper declaration types with expression types: bool for comparisons, int for integer operations, real for real operations
Remove invalid guarantees or assumptions that reference unresolved identifiers
Ensure AGREE scalar types are int, real, or bool
generic_rules: Minimize repairs to only address validator diagnostics without changing unrelated architecture
Trace validator diagnostics to their root causes before making repairs
Use only visible identifiers in repairs to maintain model consistency
Remove invalid clauses instead of adding architecture when references are unresolved
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE scalar types are int, real, and bool
Comparison expressions should be of type bool
Integer operations should be of type int
Real operations should be of type real
anti_patterns: Do not add architecture to fix unresolved references; instead, remove invalid clauses or fix the root cause
Do not use package-qualified identifiers or data types that are not visible in the current scope
Do not assume types for expressions; align declaration types with expression types
irrelevant_topics: AGREE annex placement in component types vs implementations
AADL package references and with clauses
Component type contracts and subcomponent ports
